titleStmt.title: SII 9.24: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 24. (A.R. No. 759 of 1916.) ON A BROKEN PILLAR IN A FIELD AT GUNIMORUBAGAL, MADAKASIRA TALUK, ANANTAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 858, Durmukha, Āshāḍha, ba. 5, Vaḍḍavāra. The date seems to be irregular. Āshāḍha ba. 5 of Durmukha corresponded to A.D. 936 July 11, Monday, not Vaḍḍavāra (Thursday or Saturday). The record refers itself to the reign of Bīra-Noḻamba Aṇṇayyadēva of the Noḻamba-Pallava dynasty and records that the king's Mahāsāmantādhipati, the learned Varuṇaśiva-Bhaṭāra, who was in charge of the Noḻambēśvarada-sthāna, together with some Gāvuṇḍas and others, made a grant of land for the upkeep of the tank.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śakanṛpakālā
tītasaṁvatsaraṅga
ḷeṇṭunūṟayvatte
ṇṭaneya durmukhame
mba saṁvatsara pravartti
se svasti samadhigatapa
ñcamahāśabda pallavānmaya
śrīprithuvīvallaba pa
llavakulatilaka śrīmatu bīra
noḻambanaṇnayyadēvana rā
jyābivṛddhigaḷuttarōttaramā
candrārkka saluttire svasti sama
dhigatapañcamahāśabda
mahāśamantādhipatya pa

ramēśvara paramabaṭṭā
rakaṁ japaniyamatapōpa
vāsasatyasaucācārānvi
tarttapōvanānurāga śrīmatu
puḻivāḷabāḻagrāmamā
ndāta śivasatrānuraṁjita
bhagavatpādaikābharaṇa
śrīmatu varuṇaśivaba
ṭārar noḻambēsvarada stā
namanāḷuttire tadvari
ṣābhyantarada Āṣāḍha māsa
bahaḷada pañcameyu va
ḍhavāramāge porvva
la pollagāvuṇḍanu ci
ppagāvuṇḍanu mādava
gāvuṇḍara maga Ayya
mmagāvuṇḍanu mā®deyagavuṇḍa
nu mahājanamuṁ ba(ṁ)ṇṭara Oḍeya
ra nannayyanu saṁkarayyanu Ā
ycamayyanu duggimayya

ṅgaḷu duggasammanu I
ntu Ūru mmahājanavu varu
ṇaśivabaṭārarumiḻdu
keṟege bittuvaṭava koṭṭu
keṟeya keḻage kaṭṭige pāyva
koḷagadoḷ padirkuḷa geyyaṁ
kuḍuvudu Oḷageṟe
ya kīḷkeṟeya kaḷani
ḷ mūgaṇḍugaṁ geydu kuḍu
vudu haṁtadoḷayguḷage
ydu kuḍuvudu
perake naḍeva Ōpiya
rvillādanu poṟagāgi Ā
ḻtokkalellanteruvoṁ Ara
maṇnilla pariyāra Illa ko
ḍangeyilla Oḷageṟeya kī
®keṟeyoḷokkaḷa gadde
yiṁtidānellantiruvoṁ I
dānaḻidātaṁ vāraṇāsi
yu kavileyuma I keṟe
yuma Aḷidonā pañcamahā
pātakana Ūriṁ kaḷavudu Ūrā
taneṁdātaṁ puduvāḻa sallaṁ .
Digital edition of SII 9.24 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
